title: SR 12-2: FRB: Supervisory Letter SR 12-2 on questions and answers on interagency Advisory on Interest Rate Risk Management -- January 13, 2012
title_normalized: FRB: Supervisory Letter SR 12-2 on questions and answers on interagency Advisory on Interest Rate Risk Management -- January 13, 2012
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 12-2
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: to Community Banking Organizations:  This letter applies to all state member banks, bank holding companies, savings and loan holding companies, and U.S. offices of foreign banking organizations, including those with $10 billion or less in consolidated assets.  In particular, the attached frequently asked questions document is being issued in response to questions received from community banks and should aid these institutions in managing their interest rate risk.
section_headings: TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK AND TO BANKING ORGANIZATIONS SUPERVISED BY THE FEDERAL RESERVE
bm25_text: SR 12-2 FRB: Supervisory Letter SR 12-2 on questions and answers on interagency Advisory on Interest Rate Risk Management -- January 13, 2012 to Community Banking Organizations:  This letter applies to all state member banks, bank holding companies, savings and loan holding companies, and U.S. offices of foreign banking organizations, including those with $10 billion or less in consolidated assets.  In particular, the attached frequently asked questions document is being issued in response to questions received from community banks and should aid these institutions in managing their interest rate risk. BOARD OF GOVERNORS OF THE FEDERAL RESERVE SYSTEM WASHINGTON, D.C. 20551 DIVISION OF BANKING SUPERVISION AND REGULATION TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK AND TO BANKING ORGANIZATIONS SUPERVISED BY THE FEDERAL RESERVE SUBJECT:
vector_text_prefix: Federal Reserve SR Letter SR 12-2: FRB: Supervisory Letter SR 12-2 on questions and answers on interagency Advisory on Interest Rate Risk Management -- January 13, 2012
